strategy_summary: The strategy is to use a format string vulnerability to leak a libc address, calculate the base address of libc, and then overwrite a GOT entry with the address of the backdoor function. The main steps are: 1) Leak a libc address using the format string vulnerability. 2) Calculate the base address of libc. 3) Overwrite the GOT entry of a function (e.g., printf) with the address of the backdoor function.
